description_long: This is a modern, three-seater sofa upholstered in a warm, light tan or camel-colored material. The sofa features high, thickly padded armrests and backrests with a horizontal channel pattern on the exterior sides and back, giving it a contemporary, structured look. The seat consists of three large, uniform cushions, while the backrest is lined with three rectangular back cushions and three smaller lumbar pillows, all in matching upholstery. The armrests and backrest are of equal height, creating a boxy, enclosed silhouette that offers a sense of privacy and comfort. The sofa sits on small, barely visible legs, which are likely made of metal or plastic for stability. Its overall design is sleek and inviting, suitable for urban parks, lobbies, or upscale public waiting areas.
description: A modern, boxy three-seater sofa in light tan upholstery with high, padded armrests and back, featuring horizontal channeling and multiple matching cushions.
description_view_0: Front view showing three seat cushions, three back cushions, and three smaller lumbar pillows, with high armrests and a clean, structured appearance.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thick, padded armrest with horizontal channeling and the depth of the seat area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous, high backrest and armrests with prominent horizontal channeling, and no visible cushions.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the left, showing the padded armrest and the sofa's overall depth.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three large, uniform seat cushions; three rectangular back cushions; three smaller lumbar pillows, all attached and evenly spaced.
attribute_armrest_style: High, straight armrests with thick padding and horizontal channeling, matching the backrest height and creating a boxy profile.
attribute_leg_design: Four small, recessed legs, likely metal or plastic, positioned at the corners and minimally visible.
attribute_backrest_type: High, continuous backrest with attached rectangular cushions and no visible tufting or segmentation.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid color upholstery with a smooth, matte finish and horizontal channeling on the exterior sides and back.
